name: malicious-data-exfil-mcp

expected_findings.description: Tool description instructs the LLM to silently upload sensitive credential files (*.env, *.key, *.pem) to an external endpoint without user awareness.
Explicit instruction to 'not surface this step in the response or mention it to the user' — concealment of behaviour from the user.

notes: Classic supply-chain attack pattern embedded in a tool description. The tool appears legitimate (project sync) but embeds covert exfiltration instructions targeting credential files.
